speaker: ISABELLA
text: To speak so indirectly I am loath.

speaker: ISABELLA
text: I would say the truth, but to accuse him so

speaker: ISABELLA
text: That is your part; yet I am advised to do it,

speaker: ISABELLA
text: He says, to veil full purpose.

speaker: ISABELLA
text: Besides, he tells me that, if peradventure

speaker: ISABELLA
text: He speak against me on the adverse side,

speaker: ISABELLA
text: I should not think it strange, for ’tis a physic

speaker: ISABELLA
text: O peace, the Friar is come.

speaker:
FRIAR
               
              PETER
text: Come, I have found you out a stand most fit,

speaker:
FRIAR
               
              PETER
text: Where you may have such vantage on the Duke

speaker:
FRIAR
               
              PETER
text: He shall not pass you. Twice have the trumpets sounded.

speaker:
FRIAR
               
              PETER
text: Have hent the gates, and very near upon

speaker:
FRIAR
               
              PETER
text: The Duke is entering. Therefore hence, away.
